title: Scouts' Dispatch
content:

"'''Scouts' Dispatch'''" was a series of articles presented in the ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]''. It provided an overview of discoveries made by [[Bureau of Scouting and Exploration Services|NRSS]] [[Scout/Legends|scout]] [[Korren Starchaser]]. It also included [[Roleplaying game|roleplaying]] stats for inclusion in games of ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.
